title: Subtree of Another Tree
problem_statement: Check whether one binary tree is a subtree of another.

examples.explanation: subRoot appears as a subtree of root.

constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [1, 2000]
intuition: Traverse the main tree and compare subtrees when a matching root value is found.

approaches.name: Traversal plus subtree comparison
approaches.description: For each node in root, check if the subtree rooted there is identical to subRoot.
approaches.why_not: A simple string representation can work but may require careful delimiting to avoid false matches.

interview_qa.q: What is the main check for each node?
interview_qa.a: Whether the subtree rooted there is identical to subRoot.
Yes, with serialization and string matching techniques, but recursion is simpler.
